T2.DMM 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started with the Concept Management Model Package

    DatabaseLoader Class

    DatabaseLoader.Rd

    The `DatabaseLoader` class manages the database connection, loading configuration and metadata, and executing database operations in a specified order.

    Details

    This class provides methods to initialize a database connection, load the database with required data, and execute a series of operations defined in external R class scripts. The operations are executed in the order specified in the configuration file. The class also includes utility methods for cleaning up temporary files and retrieving all operations from a specified folder.

    Methods

    `initialize(db_path, config_path, cdm_metadata)`

    Initializes the class with the provided parameters.

    • `db_path`: A string representing the path to the database file.

    • `config_path`: A string representing the path to configuration.

    • `cdm_metadata`: A string representing the path to the metadata.

    `set_database()`

    Loads the database with the required data.

    `run_db_ops(ops)`

    Executes a series of database operations in the order of config file.

    • `ops`: A list of operation objects to execute. If `NULL, they are retrieved using the `get_all_operations` method.

    Public fields

    db_path

    A string representing the path to the database file.

    data_instance

    A string representing the path to the data instance.

    config_path

    A string representing the path to the configuration file.

    cdm_metadata

    A string representing the path to the metadata file.

    config

    A list containing the configuration from `config_path` file.

    metadata

    A `data.table` object containing the metadata loaded.

    db

    A database connection object created using the `duckdb` package.

    Methods

    Public methods

    • DatabaseLoader$new()

    • DatabaseLoader$set_database()

    • DatabaseLoader$run_db_ops()

    • DatabaseLoader$clone()

    Method new()

    Initializes the class with the provided parameters.

    Usage

    DatabaseLoader$new(
  db_path = NULL,
  data_instance = NULL,
  config_path = NULL,
  cdm_metadata = NULL
)

    Arguments

    db_path

    A string representing the path to the database file.

    data_instance

    A string representing the path to the data instance.

    config_path

    A string representing the path to configuration file.

    cdm_metadata

    A string representing the path to the metadata file.

    Method set_database()

    Loads the database with the required data using config and metadata.

    Usage

    DatabaseLoader$set_database()

    Method run_db_ops()

    Executes a series of database operations in order specified in config.

    Usage

    DatabaseLoader$run_db_ops(ops = NULL)

    Arguments

    ops

    A list of operation objects to execute. If `NULL`, operations are retrieved using the `get_all_operations` method.

    Method clone()

    The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

    Usage

    DatabaseLoader$clone(deep = FALSE)

    Arguments

    deep

    Whether to make a deep clone.

    Examples

    if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
loader <- DatabaseLoader$new(
  db_path = "path/to/database.db",
  config_path = "path/to/set_db.json",
  cdm_metadata = "path/to/CDM_metadata.rds"
)
loader$set_database()
loader$run_db_ops()
} # }
